bundle.shortDescription: 4-split file explorer with per-pane color, name, hidden toggle, git status, terminal, and drag-and-drop copy
bundle.longDescription: Finder is a desktop file explorer that lets you split the window into up to four independent panes, each with its own color, name, hidden-file toggle, and optional git status bar. Drag-and-drop between panes to copy files, right-click for rename or trash, and open a terminal at any pane's path with one click.
